title: Lunara Review — Images

fields.label: Card Image Override
fields.name: acf_lunara_review_card_image
fields.instructions: Portrait/card crop for homepage and Reviews archive cards. Bridges to legacy _lunara_review_card_image as a URL.

fields.label: Hero Banner
fields.name: acf_lunara_review_hero_banner
fields.instructions: Wide image for the top of the review body. Bridges to legacy _lunara_review_hero_banner as a URL.

fields.label: Hero Banner Caption
fields.name: acf_lunara_review_hero_banner_caption
fields.instructions: Optional caption/source note. Bridges to legacy _lunara_review_hero_banner_caption.

fields.label: Context Shot
fields.name: acf_lunara_review_context_shot
fields.instructions: Usually lands after the introductory movement. Bridges to legacy _lunara_review_context_shot as a URL.

fields.label: Context Shot Caption
fields.name: acf_lunara_review_context_shot_caption
fields.instructions: Optional caption/source note. Bridges to legacy _lunara_review_context_shot_caption.

fields.label: Visual Evidence
fields.name: acf_lunara_review_visual_evidence
fields.instructions: Frame that proves a point about craft, performance, lighting, or composition. Bridges to legacy _lunara_review_visual_evidence as a URL.

fields.label: Visual Evidence Caption
fields.name: acf_lunara_review_visual_evidence_caption
fields.instructions: Optional caption/source note. Bridges to legacy _lunara_review_visual_evidence_caption.

fields.label: Thematic Echo Image
fields.name: acf_lunara_review_thematic_echo
fields.instructions: Evocative late still for longer essays. Bridges to legacy _lunara_review_thematic_echo as a URL.

fields.label: Thematic Echo Caption
fields.name: acf_lunara_review_thematic_echo_caption
fields.instructions: Optional caption/source note. Bridges to legacy _lunara_review_thematic_echo_caption.

description: ACF Pro image controls for Review cards, heroes, and cinematic still slots.
